name: harness
description: Shared Claude Code/Codex harness for monitoring repos. Provides runtime codex-gate (Stop hook) for script-agent/hub, and an on-demand proposal-review command for design/policy decisions. Domain-specific values stay in each consumer profile. monitoring-meta remains out of scope for runtime codex-gate (H4); proposal-review is available to any repo via convention profile, including monitoring-meta.
